title: Diamond Totem Of Undying
description: This resource packs turns your totem of undying diamond!
body:
# Diamond Totem of Undying

**Take your survival world to the next level with a true symbol of wealth!** This resource pack replaces the classic Totem of Undying with a refined Diamond Totem of Undying, giving it a powerful, high-value look that perfectly reflects your endgame status.

## Why download it?

- Epic Design: A clean, brilliant diamond aesthetic that feels strong, rare, and worthy of Minecraft’s most iconic material.
- Perfect for Hardcore Players: Adds a bold, prestigious feel to the item that keeps you alive when it matters most.
- Lightweight & Compatible: Designed to work smoothly alongside other resource packs and shaders without conflicts. Survive in style — because even cheating death should look legendary.

### Terms of Use

You are free to use this resource pack in Minecraft, your videos, and your modpacks.

If you include it in a modpack or showcase it in a video, I would appreciate it if you add a link to this page in the description.

_**Do not redistribute or claim the pack as your own.**_
